name: Octopus with Garlic- Polipi Veraci All'aglio
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the eyes and mouth of the octopus. Remove the ink sac and internal bone.
2. Cut off the tough points in the tentacles.
3. Beat each octopus well on a board to break the fibers and make the meat more tender.
4. Wash them in running water until they are very white; do not dry but put them in an earthenware dish.
5. Season with oil, flavored with garlic, bay leaf, and cumin seeds.
6. Cover the dish tightly with a sheet of waxed paper or foil tied around the top with string.
7. Put the dish over a very low heat between 1 and 2 hours, according to the size of the octopus.
8. When they are tender, drain them, season with additional oil, salt, green pepper, rosemary leaves, and parsley.
9. Serve in a tureen.
